# signoz_role (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "signoz_role" "editor" {
  name        = "editor"
  description = "Can view dashboards across the org"

  transaction_groups = [
    {
      relation = "read"

      object_group = {
        resource = {
          type = "telemetryresource"
          kind = "dashboard"
        }

        selectors = ["*"]
      }
    },
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `description` (String)
- `transaction_groups` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--transaction_groups))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `org_id` (String)
- `type` (String)

- `relation` (String)

### Nested Schema for `transaction_groups.object_group`

- `selectors` (List of String)

<a id="nestedatt--transaction_groups--object_group--resource"></a>
### Nested Schema for `transaction_groups.object_group.resource`

- `type` (String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Roles are imported using their ID.
terraform import signoz_role.editor 0192a9c2-1234-7abc-8def-0123456789ab
```
